payload.answer: There are concurrent memory writes about Sam’s employment: “Sam works at Goldman” and “Sam joined Point72.” These may conflict if they refer to the same Sam and the same current employment relationship, but the backend has not established which fact should replace the other. Safe actions available: approve_supersession, keep_both, reject_new, or edit.
citations: Concurrent writes: Sam works at Goldman. Sam joined Point72.

entity_resolution.reason: Both writes appear to refer to Sam but provide conflicting or time-sensitive employment information without enough context to determine whether Goldman is outdated, Point72 is additional, or one statement should be rejected.

details: Conflict detected between concurrent employment-related writes.
No durable memory should be committed as current until the conflict is resolved.
Only backend-supplied safe actions are presented.
